game_info.title: Cuphead Boss Battle
game_info.concept:
Cuphead is a classic run and gun action game heavily focused on boss battles. Inspired by cartoons of the 1930s, the visuals and audio are painstakingly created with the same techniques of the era, i.e. traditional hand drawn cel animation, watercolor backgrounds, and original jazz recordings.
Cuphead is a classic run and gun action game heavily focused on boss battles. Inspired by cartoons of the 1930s, the visuals and audio are painstakingly created with the same techniques of the era, i.e. traditional hand drawn cel animation, watercolor backgrounds, and original jazz recordings.

Play as Cuphead or Mugman (in single player or local co-op) as you traverse strange worlds, acquire new weapons, learn powerful super moves, and discover hidden secrets while you try to pay your debt back to the devil!
game_info.description: Battle through intense boss fights as Cuphead in this run-and-gun action game! Face off against a challenging boss with multiple attack patterns. Dodge projectiles, dash to avoid danger, and shoot your way to victory. Collect power-ups to enhance your abilities. Defeat the boss to win, but be careful - you only have 3 lives!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Move left and right
Space: Shoot projectiles
Shift: Dash (quick dodge with brief invincibility)
Z: Parry (deflect pink projectiles for bonus points)
Enter: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart from game over screen

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic movement, shooting mechanics, and collision detection. The bot will move around the arena while constantly shooting at the boss to verify that projectiles are created, travel correctly, and deal damage to the boss.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The bot will alternate between moving left and right while continuously shooting. It will occasionally dash to test the dash mechanic. The bot will maintain a safe distance from the boss and avoid standing still.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test is successful if the player can move smoothly, projectiles are fired consistently, and the boss takes damage when hit. The game should not crash and all animations should play correctly.
